name: spellbot-web
description: Vitest unit tests for the pure JavaScript helpers in src/spellbot/web/templates.

scripts.license-check: license-checker-evergreen --onlyAllow "MIT;ISC;BSD-2-Clause;BSD-3-Clause;Apache-2.0;MPL-2.0;CC0-1.0;CC-BY-3.0;(MIT AND CC-BY-3.0);(CC-BY-4.0 AND OFL-1.1 AND MIT);UNLICENSED"
scripts.format: npm run format:web && npm run format:jinja
